about.title: About me
about.description: I am APEDO Elias Josué Kossi, a passionate web developer based in Lomé, Togo.

presentation.title: Fullstack Web Developer & Founder of Logonova Agency
presentation.paragraph: Passionate about web development from Lomé, Togo, I am a self-taught developer with a clear vision: to create high-quality digital experiences. I have strong international ambitions and am open to opportunities in France, Canada, Switzerland, the USA, and Germany.
